missions.name: Relay TX-4 Cold Reboot
missions.description: Comms relay TX-4 dropped off the grid last orbit. Dock at the relay, EVA out, and cycle the cold-gas thruster array so ground stations can reacquire it.

missions.name: Helios Probe Calibration
missions.description: The Helios-3 gravitometric probe is reading drift. EVA out to its waypoint and re-seat the sensor boom — 20 minutes of float time, no rush.

missions.name: Cubesat Cluster Firmware Patch
missions.description: A cluster of three cubesats missed the last OTA window. Visit the formation, jack into the master node, and push the patch manually.
